meta.title: Reprint Push Local Edited
meta.description: Pulled local WordPress site after local changes.
meta.author: Reprint Push Lab

steps.code:
<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $shared_id = wp_insert_post(array('import_id'=>1001,'post_title'=>'Shared base post','post_name'=>'shared-base-post','post_content'=>'Local edited content','post_status'=>'publish','post_author'=>1)); add_post_meta($shared_id, 'reprint_push_fixture', 'shared', true); update_post_meta($shared_id, '_reprint_push_forms_schema', array('owner'=>'forms','schemaVersion'=>'2-local','form'=>'contact','required'=>array('email','message','phone'),'fields'=>array(array('key'=>'email','type'=>'email','label'=>'Email address','enabled'=>true),array('key'=>'message','type'=>'textarea','label'=>'Project brief','enabled'=>true),array('key'=>'phone','type'=>'tel','label'=>'Phone','enabled'=>false)),'notifications'=>array('admin'=>true,'copyToSender'=>true))); $local_id = wp_insert_post(array('import_id'=>2001,'post_title'=>'Local-only draft','post_name'=>'local-only-draft','post_content'=>'Created locally after pull','post_status'=>'draft','post_author'=>1)); add_post_meta($local_id, 'reprint_push_fixture', 'local-only', true); update_post_meta($local_id, '_reprint_push_forms_schema', array('owner'=>'forms','schemaVersion'=>'1-local-only','form'=>'intake','required'=>array('email'),'fields'=>array(array('key'=>'email','type'=>'email','label'=>'Email','enabled'=>true),array('key'=>'budget','type'=>'select','label'=>'Budget','enabled'=>true,'choices'=>array('small','medium','large'))),'notifications'=>array('admin'=>false,'copyToSender'=>true))); $dir = WP_CONTENT_DIR . '/uploads/reprint-push'; wp_mkdir_p($dir); file_put_contents($dir . '/shared.txt', 'local upload content'); file_put_contents($dir . '/local-only.txt', 'local-only upload content'); update_option('reprint_push_plugin_payload', array('owner'=>'forms','mode'=>'local-edited','version'=>2)); update_option('reprint_push_forms_fixture', array('owner'=>'forms','enabled'=>true,'revision'=>'002-local','forms'=>array('contact'=>array('title'=>'Contact the studio','version'=>'2','active'=>true,'fields'=>array('email','message','phone'),'limits'=>array('daily'=>'40','perIp'=>'4')),'newsletter'=>array('title'=>'Newsletter','version'=>'1','active'=>true,'fields'=>array('email','source'),'segments'=>array('general','product','local'))),'routing'=>array('notify'=>array('local-admin@example.test','ops@example.test'),'storeSubmissions'=>true),'flags'=>array('honeypot'=>true,'captcha'=>true))); $plugin_dir = WP_PLUGIN_DIR . '/reprint-push-forms-fixture'; wp_mkdir_p($plugin_dir); $plugin_basename = 'reprint-push-forms-fixture/reprint-push-forms-fixture.php'; file_put_contents(WP_PLUGIN_DIR . '/' . $plugin_basename, "<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Reprint Push Forms Fixture
Version: 1.0.0
*/
"); $active_plugins = get_option('active_plugins', array()); if (!in_array($plugin_basename, $active_plugins, true)) { $active_plugins[] = $plugin_basename; update_option('active_plugins', $active_plugins); } global $wpdb; $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'reprint_push_forms_lab'; $wpdb->query('CREATE TABLE ' . $table . ' (id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL, form_slug varchar(191) NOT NULL, payload_json longtext NOT NULL, updated_marker varchar(32) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id)) ' . $wpdb->get_charset_collate()); $wpdb->replace($table, array('id'=>1,'form_slug'=>'contact','payload_json'=>wp_json_encode(array('owner'=>'forms','mode'=>'base','version'=>'1','rules'=>array('requireConsent'=>true,'maxAttachments'=>'2'))),'updated_marker'=>'base'), array('%d','%s','%s','%s'));
